info.title: Hospital DB Dashboard API
info.description: REST API for Hospital Database Dashboard - hidb10949

get.description: Returns comprehensive database statistics including table counts, row counts, sizes, module distribution, and health indicators.
Returns list of all database modules with statistics including table counts, sizes, and descriptions.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter modules by name or description

modules.name: patient
modules.description: ข้อมูลผู้ป่วยและบุคคล

modules.name: opd
modules.description: บริการผู้ป่วยนอก

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific module including all tables in that module.

data.name: patient
data.description: ข้อมูลผู้ป่วยและบุคคล

get.description: Returns summary of all database anomalies grouped by category with severity counts.

orphan_tables.description: Tables not classified to any module

get.description: Returns detailed list of anomalies for a specific category.
Returns list of recommended indexes to improve database performance, prioritized by impact.

recommendations.sql: ALTER TABLE data_correct ADD PRIMARY KEY (hospcode, tablename);
recommendations.impact: Critical - Table has 8.4M rows without primary key
recommendations.estimated_benefit: Significant performance improvement for lookups and joins

recommendations.sql: ALTER TABLE PERSON ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);
recommendations.impact: Critical - Core patient table without primary key
recommendations.estimated_benefit: Essential for data integrity and query performance

recommendations.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chronic_hospcode_pid ON chronic (hospcode, pid);
recommendations.impact: Medium - Chronic disease table needs faster lookups
recommendations.estimated_benefit: Improved query performance for chronic patient lookups

get.description: Returns paginated list of all database tables with metadata.
Returns detailed information about a specific table including columns, indexes, and anomalies.

anomalies.description: Table has 105,707 rows but no primary key

recommendations.sql: ALTER TABLE PERSON ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);
recommendations.description: Add primary key for data integrity and performance
